corrections_by_claim.note: Correct. The mention of Huawei/Cambricon iterating rapidly is a weak illustrative point for productive investment, but lacks the hard capex data required for higher strength.

Correct. It illustrates the use of extra-economic coercion (sanctions/bans) as a tool of capitalist competition, though it doesn't name the theory.
